# Code of Conduct

## Our pledge

We want PromptPanel to be a practical, respectful project for people building and reviewing a focused macOS utility.

Participants are expected to:

- Be direct without being hostile.
- Keep technical disagreement focused on evidence and tradeoffs.
- Respect project scope decisions, especially the local-first and no-cloud boundaries.
- Avoid harassment, insults, or personal attacks.

## Enforcement

Maintainers may edit, hide, or remove comments and contributions that violate this code of conduct. Repeated or severe violations may result in a ban from project spaces.

## Reporting

Report conduct concerns to `wwtvn1937@gmail.com`. Include links or screenshots when relevant.

This policy is intentionally short and project-specific. It is compatible with the spirit of the Contributor Covenant without copying its full text into this repository.
